bead.title: Stage 1.10: update developer docs (root CLAUDE.md + cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md + root README.md)
bead.description: Update THREE files: /Users/erik/Projects/ddx/CLAUDE.md, /Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md, /Users/erik/Projects/ddx/README.md. Dev loop now describes: `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun install && bun run dev`, `bun run houdini:generate`, `bun run test`, `bun run test:e2e`. Zero React/Vite references. IMPORTANT: cli/CLAUDE.md and cli/README.md do NOT exist — do not create them. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #10.
bead.acceptance: (1) Root CLAUDE.md, cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md, root README.md all reference bun commands. (2) Zero React/Vite references in any of the three files. (3) No new files created (no cli/CLAUDE.md or cli/README.md).
